title: Karnan
writer: Kannadasan, Sakthi T.K. Krishnasamy, A.S. Nagarajan
actors: Shivaji Ganesan, N.T. Rama Rao, S.A. Ashokan
plot: Story of the central hero of Mahabharata who rises from nothing to becoming the world's greatest warrior ever born in history and emerges as the hero of the Kurukshetra war.
